title: Corporate Law
description: Comprehensive legal services for businesses including company formation, mergers & acquisitions, corporate governance, and regulatory compliance.

title: Family Law
description: Compassionate legal guidance through family matters including divorce, child custody, adoption, and domestic disputes.

title: Criminal Defense
description: Aggressive defense representation for individuals facing criminal charges, from minor offenses to serious felony cases.

title: Property Law
description: Expert legal assistance with real estate transactions, property disputes, land registration, and tenancy matters.

title: Civil Litigation
description: Skilled courtroom advocacy for civil disputes including contract breaches, personal injury, and tort claims.

title: Labor Law
description: Advisory and litigation services for employment disputes, labor rights, workplace safety, and union matters.
